title: The Girl Next Door
writer: Isobel Lennart, Leslie Bush-Fekete, Maria Fagyas
actors: Dan Dailey, June Haver, Dennis Day
plot: Stage-and-night club star Jeannie Laird (June Haver) buys her first home, and everyone who is anyone comes to her first garden party only to be blinded by smoke from next door. Jeannie charges next door to bawl out her new neighbo...
